## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Marcel Santilli (fwd.digital) and Mithun Lance to discuss potential roles and fit within fwd.digital's growing team.](https://fathom.video/share/JzMkyusZayknajixGrTdrmsxx2oLQ_Me?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Severe technical difficulties prevented a productive conversation, necessitating rescheduling](https://fathom.video/share/JzMkyusZayknajixGrTdrmsxx2oLQ_Me?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)
  - [fwd.digital is experiencing rapid growth, creating various potential roles](https://fathom.video/share/JzMkyusZayknajixGrTdrmsxx2oLQ_Me?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [Initial team impression of Mithun was positive, noting high potential despite some profile gaps](https://fathom.video/share/JzMkyusZayknajixGrTdrmsxx2oLQ_Me?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [Mithun has a background in product marketing and digital marketing agency experience](https://fathom.video/share/JzMkyusZayknajixGrTdrmsxx2oLQ_Me?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)

## Topics

### Technical Difficulties

  - [Persistent audio issues throughout the call, with both parties experiencing "cutting out"](https://fathom.video/share/JzMkyusZayknajixGrTdrmsxx2oLQ_Me?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)
  - [Multiple attempts to resolve: rejoining the call, turning off video](https://fathom.video/share/JzMkyusZayknajixGrTdrmsxx2oLQ_Me?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)
  - [Despite efforts, communication remained challenging, impacting ability to have a meaningful discussion](https://fathom.video/share/JzMkyusZayknajixGrTdrmsxx2oLQ_Me?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)

### fwd.digital's Growth and Opportunities

  - [Company experiencing rapid growth with new client onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/JzMkyusZayknajixGrTdrmsxx2oLQ_Me?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [More work than current staff can handle, creating various potential roles](https://fathom.video/share/JzMkyusZayknajixGrTdrmsxx2oLQ_Me?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [Team impressed by Mithun's energy and sees high potential, despite some profile gaps](https://fathom.video/share/JzMkyusZayknajixGrTdrmsxx2oLQ_Me?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [Marcel aiming to understand Mithun's profile and aspirations to match with potential opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/JzMkyusZayknajixGrTdrmsxx2oLQ_Me?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### Mithun's Background (Partial)

  - [Graduated from Kansas in 2016 with a business degree](https://fathom.video/share/JzMkyusZayknajixGrTdrmsxx2oLQ_Me?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [Worked at a digital marketing agency for 1 year starting 2018](https://fathom.video/share/JzMkyusZayknajixGrTdrmsxx2oLQ_Me?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Experience as a product marketing manager in 3 different tech companies](https://fathom.video/share/JzMkyusZayknajixGrTdrmsxx2oLQ_Me?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - [Current role: Product Marketing Manager / Executive Assistant](https://fathom.video/share/JzMkyusZayknajixGrTdrmsxx2oLQ_Me?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
  - [Involvement in creating processes and SOPs for a brand new company (details unclear due to audio issues)](https://fathom.video/share/JzMkyusZayknajixGrTdrmsxx2oLQ_Me?tab=summary&timestamp=358.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Alice (likely an assistant or team member) to reschedule the meeting](https://fathom.video/share/JzMkyusZayknajixGrTdrmsxx2oLQ_Me?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
  - [Both parties to ensure stable internet connections for the next call](https://fathom.video/share/JzMkyusZayknajixGrTdrmsxx2oLQ_Me?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
  - [Mithun to prepare a concise overview of his background and aspirations for the rescheduled meeting](https://fathom.video/share/JzMkyusZayknajixGrTdrmsxx2oLQ_Me?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [Marcel to come prepared with specific questions about Mithun's experience and potential fit within fwd.digital](https://fathom.video/share/JzMkyusZayknajixGrTdrmsxx2oLQ_Me?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
